auth.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.account_disabled: This account has been disabled, please contact the administrator.
auth.mail_not_configured: The email service is not configured, please contact the administrator.
auth.mail_send_failed: Email sending failed, please try again later.
auth.password_min: Password must be at least %d characters
auth.password_confirm_mismatch: The passwords entered twice are inconsistent
auth.verification_expired: The verification code is wrong or expired, please apply again.
auth.verification_wrong: The verification code is incorrect, please re-enter it.
auth.register_sent: We have sent a verification code to your email. Please check and enter the verification code to complete the registration.
auth.register_success: Registration is successful, welcome to become a Gunpla Mall member!
auth.register_failed: Registration failed, please try again later.
auth.firebase_not_configured: Firebase login has not been set up, please contact your administrator.
auth.firebase_invalid: Firebase login verification failed, please try again later.
auth.firebase_email_unverified: Please verify your email in the third-party account before trying again.
auth.firebase_no_local_account: This account has not been registered yet, please register first.
auth.firebase_account_mismatch: This email has been bound to another third-party account, please use the original method to log in.
auth.firebase_already_registered: This email is already registered, please log in instead.
